message:
fix(fcp-webhook): bound replay cache at 100k entries and fix timestamp tolerance boundary

Prevent unbounded memory growth in the idempotency cache which was a
DoS vector:

- Add MAX_SEEN_EVENTS = 100_000 constant
- record_event() and claim_event() now return Err(ReplayCacheFull) when
  cache is at capacity and event is new
- Change record_event signature from infallible to returning WebhookResult<()>
- Update all test call sites with .unwrap()
- Fix off-by-one in Stripe/Slack timestamp tolerance checks (> to >=),
  making the boundary exact so timestamps exactly at tolerance are rejected
- Add ReplayCacheFull { size, limit } error variant with display test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
